answer: Shopify APIs use access tokens for authentication, typically passed in the X-Shopify-Access-Token header [1][2]. For Admin API apps, the recommended approach is to use Shopify managed installation with token exchange (preferred for embedded apps) or the authorization code grant flow [3][4][5]. Apps can also use client credentials grant for backend applications without a UI [6]. For the Storefront API, use either public access tokens (via X-Shopify-Storefront-Access-Token header) or private access tokens (via X-Shopify-Storefront-Private-Token header) [7]. Shopify provides official client libraries to simplify these processes [3][1][2].
